statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // .cwd'); dir=$(basename "$cwd"); branch=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); out="$dir"; [ -n "$branch" ] && out="$out | $branch"; [ -n "$used" ] && out="$out | ctx: $(printf '%.0f' "$used")%"; printf "%s" "$out"
